'''Drax Squadron''' was one of three [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtrooper]] units divided from [[Desert Sands]]. In [[0 BBY/Legends|0 BBY]], Drax Squadron was tasked with finding an [[Escape pod/Legends|escape pod]] on the desert planet [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]]. At first they were joined by [[Alvien Squadron]] in their search for the jettisoned craft, but when [[Zeta Squadron (Desert Sands)|Zeta Squadron]] discovered they were looking for a pair of [[Droid/Legends|droids]], Drax and Zeta were both ordered to search [[Mos Eisley/Legends|Mos Eisley]] door to door to find their quarry.
